race.comment: NITRO (16) lightly raced gelding who indicated he was in for a good prep when he rattled late from near last on the turn with a game first-up second as fav over 1300m at Scone. Blinkers come off and visors go on for this. Can race a touch closer and finish over the top of these. INVADER ZIM (15) finally got the monkey off the back when he ploughed through the heavy (10) going to salute over this course and distance. Up slightly in weight and this is no tougher. CROSSBOW (11) proven at this level and has a good record with the apprentice. Sat on the fast tempo and just failed to pick up Theblade with a game second over 1400m at Randwick Kensington. Well weighted and sure to be thereabouts. GLORIOUS MOMENTS (4) progressive gelding held in high regard by the stable. Good first-up win and looking for his trip now. Keep safe. UNIQUE AMBITION (10) deserves another chance after the good win over this track and trip two back.
